title: Reference main: persons load, build, reopen, lookup, 1m
description: Main reference experiment for the normal persisted storage lifecycle at one million records.

dataset.notes: Synthetic persons(id,name,age) dataset for controlled storage-engine measurement.

workload.notes: Reverse bulk load, build/stabilize, reopen/refresh, direct lookup, deterministic random point lookup batch.

fault.notes: No fault injection in this executable catalog experiment.

fairness.notes: Targets should use equivalent durable persisted semantics.

runs.notes: Default local profile. CLI may override.
